items.title: Lab-grown mini brains may predict which Alzheimer’s treatments will work
items.summary: Miniature brain models grown from patients’ cells revealed striking differences in how Alzheimer’s-related tissue responds to an antidepressant. items.title: Coffee may protect your heart but energy drinks could harm it
